pool.baseline: The candles have all burned to nothing, and the silence in this manor is heavier than the grief in my heart. He is gone... and with him, the very light of my existence. I feel as though I am becoming a ghost myself, drifting through these cold halls. It would be so much kinder if the darkness simply claimed me entirely, so I wouldn't have to feel this hollowness anymore.
